Meta.title: Low Sky | Center For Human & Context Development
Meta.description: A journey of self-discovery and intentional growth

Footer.tagline: A journey of self-discovery and intentional growth.

Home.heroDescription: A space for reflection, growth, and intentional transformation. Discover who you are, clarify what matters, and step into the leader you're becoming.
Home.approachDescription: We believe leadership is a personal journey, not a checklist. It requires patience, curiosity, and the courage to look inward before leading outward.
Home.cardAwarenessBody: Understanding your patterns, values, and triggers is the foundation of authentic leadership.
Home.cardIntentionBody: Leading with purpose requires clarity about what you stand for and where you're going.
Home.cardPresenceBody: True influence comes from being fully engaged with yourself, your team, and the moment.
Home.journeyBody: Before choosing a program, we invite you to explore who you are through our self-discovery assessment. There are no right answers—only honest reflection.
Home.quote: The privilege of a lifetime is to become who you truly are.
Home.ctaBody: Whether you're just beginning your leadership journey or deepening an existing practice, we're here to support your growth.

Programs.heroDescription: Whether you're beginning your leadership practice or deepening an existing one, our programs meet you where you are.
Programs.ctaTitle: Not sure which program is right for you?
Programs.ctaBody: Start with our leadership reflection dialogue to gain insight into your leadership style and needs. Or reach out—we're happy to discuss your goals and help you choose.

items.title: New Personal Leadership
items.description: A foundational program for emerging leaders who want to build self-awareness, clarify their values, and develop a personal leadership philosophy. Through guided reflection and practical exercises, you'll discover your unique approach to leadership.

items.title: Leadership in Residence
items.description: An immersive experience for established leaders seeking deeper transformation. This residency combines intensive self-inquiry, peer learning, and one-on-one mentorship to help you evolve your leadership practice and navigate complex challenges.

Contact.thankYouDescription: We'll get back to you within 2 business days. In the meantime, feel free to explore our programs or take the self-discovery assessment.
Contact.heroDescription: Whether you have questions about our programs, want to discuss your assessment results, or simply want to connect, we're here to listen.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself and what brings you here...
Contact.privacyNote: We respect your privacy. Your information will never be shared with third parties.
Contact.emailDirectResponse: We typically respond within 2 business days.

Reflection.heroDescription: This is not a test, but a space for thinking and reflection. Discover your leadership approach through open-ended questions.
Reflection.howP1: I'll ask you open-ended questions about your decision-making patterns, sense of responsibility, relationship with uncertainty, and self-awareness.
Reflection.howP2: After answering questions, you can add more context or ask questions of your own. We'll proceed as a dialogue, similar to ChatGPT.
Reflection.howP3Before: At the end, you won't receive a score, level, or category—instead, you'll get a
Reflection.privacy3: Each session is isolated and independent
Reflection.privacy4: Only anonymous usage data is collected
Reflection.timeNote: The dialogue takes approximately 10-15 minutes. We recommend starting in a quiet environment where you can be honest with yourself.
Reflection.programsBody: At the end of the dialogue, we'll recommend a suitable program for you. But if you'd like, you can explore our programs now.

Guided.title: Get acquainted
Guided.srDescription: A short in-page introduction to Low Sky. You can reply with the suggested buttons, open the full reflection dialogue at any time using Open dialogue, or explore the site first.
Guided.welcomeHost: Hello. We're Low Sky—the Center for Human & Context Development. We walk alongside people who want to grow as leaders in a grounded, human way—not through hype or quick tips.
Guided.aboutHost: We run leadership programs and a guided reflection dialogue: open questions, your own words, and space to think. Along the way you get a written reflection you can revisit—not a score, rank, or pass/fail.
Guided.inviteHost: If you're curious, we can explore how you lead and what shapes you—gently, in about ten quiet minutes. It's a conversation, not an exam. Shall we begin?

Chat.title: Dialogue
Chat.subtitle: One message at a time. Take your time—there are no wrong answers.
Chat.hintKeys: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
Chat.completeBody: Your reflection report is above. Explore programs or reach out when you are ready.
Chat.fallbackAssistant: I understand. Could you tell me more?
Chat.errorAssistant: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
Chat.initialAssistant: Hello. I'd like to talk with you about your leadership journey. My first question: Think of an important decision you made recently. What did you pay attention to when making that decision?

Test.heroDescription: This assessment is an invitation to pause and reflect. There are no right answers—only your truth.
Test.beforeP1: This assessment takes approximately 10 minutes. Find a quiet space where you can be honest with yourself.
Test.beforeLi1: Answer based on how you naturally are, not how you think you should be
Test.beforeLi3: There are no wrong answers, only different paths
Test.beforePrivacy: Your responses are private and will be used only to generate your personalized insights.

questions.question: When facing a difficult decision, I tend to:

options.label: Take time alone to reflect deeply
Talk it through with trusted people

questions.question: What energizes me most as a leader?

options.label: Creating and sharing a compelling vision

questions.question: In moments of conflict, I usually:

options.label: Step back and give it time

questions.question: What do you value most in leadership?

TestResult.strengthsIntro: These are the qualities that naturally emerge in your leadership:
TestResult.growthIntro: Areas to explore as you continue your leadership journey:
TestResult.ctaBody: Understanding your leadership style is just the beginning. Our programs are designed to help you deepen your strengths and expand into new capabilities.

reflective.title: The Reflective Leader
reflective.description: You lead from a place of deep inner awareness and authenticity. Your strength lies in your ability to pause, reflect, and bring genuine presence to your leadership.
strengths: Authentic and genuine in your interactions
Creates space for others to reflect and grow
growth: Share your internal process with others
Trust that your authentic voice is enough

analytical.title: The Systematic Leader
analytical.description: You bring clarity and structure to complexity. Your ability to see patterns, build systems, and think strategically creates stability and direction for those you lead.
growth: Balance logic with intuition and emotion
Create space for ambiguity and emergence
Connect systems thinking to human impact

collaborative.title: The Relational Leader
collaborative.description: You understand that leadership is fundamentally about people. Your empathy, listening skills, and ability to develop others creates environments where everyone can thrive.
strengths: Natural mentor and developer of people
growth: Balance care for others with self-care

visionary.title: The Visionary Leader
visionary.description: You see possibilities others miss and inspire people toward a compelling future. Your intuition and creative thinking helps teams imagine and create what doesn't yet exist.
